title: BlackBerry Earnings Preview 2022
text: BlackBerry Ltd. (NYSE: BB) was scheduled to report fiscal fourth-quarter results after market close on Thursday. After touching a high of around $20.00 in early June, the shares have dropped about 62% of their value. Revenue Forecast: Analysts projected Q4 revenue of $186.04 million, representing a 1.1% sequential increase but a 13% year-over-year decline. Earnings: The company was expected to post an adjusted loss per share of $0.03, worsening from the prior quarter's breakeven performance. Business Overview: The company had transitioned from its legacy mobile phone business to cybersecurity and automotive software platforms. Cybersecurity accounted for approximately two-thirds of revenue, while QNX represented its embedded operating software offering for automobiles. Analyst Sentiment: Coverage was sparse and predominantly negative. Among nine covering brokerages, five have Sell or Strong Sell ratings, and none has rated the shares at Buy or Strong Buy. Full-Year Outlook: For fiscal 2022, BlackBerry faced forecasted losses of $0.14 per share with revenue declining 19.6% to $748.38 million.
